description_long: This bungalow features a simple, modern design with a rectangular footprint and a gable roof finished in a uniform brown color. The front facade is clad in vertical wood paneling and includes a central black door, a large sliding glass door to the left, and a wide window to the right, all framed in black. Two small exterior wall lights flank the entryway, providing illumination for the front approach. The structure sits on a flat, brown platform that extends outward, suggesting a small entry landing or patio. The side and rear elevations are unadorned, with the same wood paneling and no visible windows or doors. The overall appearance is clean and minimal, with a focus on functional, contemporary lines.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a brown gable roof, wood-paneled exterior, and a front facade featuring a black door, large window, and sliding glass door.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, sliding glass door, large window, and two exterior wall lights on a wood-paneled facade.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the gable end of the roof and plain wood paneling, with the front platform partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a featureless wood-paneled wall and the full span of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gable end and plain wood paneling, with the front platform visible on the right.
